title: goodenia byrnesii
intro: Goodenia byrnesii, also known as Byrnes' goodenia or Byrnes' tick-trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It is native to Western Australia and is used in traditional Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as wound healing and immune system support. Goodenia byrnesii is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
